quizzes.q: What should you say to someone when greeting them at 9:00 AM?
Complete the introduction: 'Hi, ________ name is Sarah.'

exercises.situation: You just met a new neighbor at your door. What is the most friendly and natural welcome?
options: Hi! It is wonderful to meet you.
exercises.note: 💡 'It is wonderful to meet you' is welcoming and highly polite for social greetings.
